meta.generated_note: Regenerate with: npx tsx tools/gen-srd5e-vectors.ts (runs the real srd5e modules + the ruleset-AST evaluator over every case and asserts the hand-computed expectation before writing).
meta.vector: SRD 5e action-pack golden vectors: builder documents on scripted dice streams + slot-economy transitions (incl. the widen-merge) + concentration flows
meta.note: Harness rules for kind 'action' follow AST-V2-SPEC sections 1.3/1.5 (scripted rollDie pops stream entries in order; accept vectors consume the stream fully; entities not listed in a *_after field are asserted unchanged). The harness MUST also rebuild each action's document via build.fn/build.args and assert deep equality with the embedded ast/mutations - that is the builder-drift pin. Kinds 'slots' and 'concentration' are pure op cases compared with deep equality; op inputs must never be mutated.

cases.label: W1 weapon attack (str 1d8) plain hit: 13+3 vs ac 13, damage 5+3
W2 weapon attack nat-20 crit: doubled DICE (2d8), mod once
W3 weapon attack nat-1 auto-miss even though the total beats ac 2
W4 weapon attack plain miss: damage dice never rolled
FB1 fire_bolt tier 1: flat 1d10, no mod on cantrip damage
FB2 fire_bolt tier 5: 2d10
FB3 fire_bolt tier 11: 3d10
FB4 fire_bolt tier 17 nat-20 crit: 4d10 doubles to 8d10
FB5 ray_of_frost hit applies the slowed_10ft rider tag
EB1 eldritch_blast one beam, agonizing: 1d10 + cha_mod
SF1 sacred_flame lands: target save 11 under dc 13
SF2 sacred_flame saved: nothing on a save, damage dice never rolled
SF3 sacred_flame auto-fail: paralyzed target lands the spell despite save 20 (the save d20 is still drawn)
TD1 toll_the_dead vs a wounded target: live hp < hp_max read upgrades to d12
TD2 toll_the_dead vs an unwounded target: d8 branch
VM1 vicious_mockery lands: 1d4 psychic + the disadv_next_attack rider tag
MM1 magic_missile slot 1: 3 darts, each a fresh 1d4+1 (auto-hit, no check)
MM2 magic_missile slot 5: 7 darts
FBL1 fireball slot 3 multi-target: g_a saves (half, floor_div), g_b fails (full), per-target fresh 8d6
FBL2 fireball slot 5 single-target check variant: failed save takes the full 10d6
TW1 thunderwave slot 1 multi (CON save - no auto-fail arms): one target fails, takes full 2d8
HR1 hellish_rebuke saved: half damage via floor_div on a FRESH 2d10
CW1 cure_wounds slot 1: 1d8 + spell_mod, then the hp_max overheal clamp
HW1 healing_word slot 3: 3d4 + spell_mod, clamp branch untaken
HP1 hold_person lands: paralyzed tag, zero damage by construction
WB1 web lands via the DEX auto-fail or-arm: stunned target is restrained despite save 23
SR1 scorching_ray one ray nat-20 crit: 2d6 doubles to 4d6
S1 wizard 1 fresh pool
S2 wizard 5 fresh pool
S3 wizard 20 fresh pool (the full SRD row)
S4 paladin 1 has no slots yet
S5 paladin 5 half-caster row
S6 warlock 5 pact slots
S7 fighter has no pool
S8 spend an open level-3 slot
S9 spend a dry level: no_slot, pool unchanged
S10 spend slot 0 is not a slot (a cantrip)
S11 spend slot 10 is a bad slot level
S12 spend_lowest auto-upcasts when the base tier is dry (5e RAW)
S13 spend_lowest with the whole walk dry: no_higher_slot
S14 spend a pact slot at its level
S15 spend_lowest walks up to the pact tier
S16 restore 2 spent level-2 slots
S17 restore floors used at 0
S18 widen-merge level-up (THE P0): shape derives fresh, used carries over
S19 widen-merge caps carried used at the new max
S20 widen for a non-caster returns the stored pool untouched
S21 widen with null stored returns the fresh pool
S22 widen-merge re-derives the pact shape, carrying pact used
S23 short rest refreshes pact slots (warlock)
S24 short rest is a no-op for a wizard
S25 long rest refreshes everything
S26 upcast fireball at slot 5: +2d6
S27 upcast magic_missile at slot 9: 8 extra darts

info.note: one extra dart per slot level above 1st

cases.label: S28 upcast spiritual_weapon at slot 5: one even step (+1d8)

info.note: +1d8 damage per TWO slot levels above 2nd - generated variants exist only at even slot levels

cases.label: S29 upcast hold_person at slot 4: 2 extra targets, concentration

info.note: one extra humanoid target per slot level above 2nd (host enumerates targets)

cases.label: S30 upcast of an unknown spell is null
S31 total dice: fireball 8d6 at slot 5 is 10d6
S32 total dice: spiritual_weapon 1d8 at slot 6 is 3d8 (two even steps)
S33 total dice: magic_missile dice never scale (darts do)
C1 dc floors at 10 for small hits
C2 dc is half damage above the floor
C3 dc 18 at damage 36
C4 dc floors at 10 even at damage 21 (floor_div)
C5 dc at the boundary: damage 23 -> 11
C6 start concentrating from idle
C7 starting a second spell DROPS the first (one at a time)
C8 drop while idle is a no-op
C9 drop ends the active spell
C10 maintain while not concentrating: nothing needed, nothing drops
C11 maintain keeps at exactly the dc (total >= dc)
C12 maintain fails one under the dc: the spell drops
